message:
🐛 Broadcast failure when update aborts on uncommitted changes (#2041)

executeDevReleaseUpdate() silently returned when uncommitted changes
were detected, leaving the frontend stuck in "triggered" state with
no feedback to the user. Now broadcasts a "failed" status via
WebSocket so the UI shows the error and the progress banner clears.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
